{{Infobox group
| name = Regents
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Regents Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Regents are four legendary figures who serve as the primary representatives of [[the Emperor]]. As his former companions, they possess power and status that exceed even the heads of the [[Imperial Guilds]]. Historically, these individuals have functioned as protectors of humanity, emerging from long periods of hibernation to combat major rebellions or the influence of [[Great Elders]]. While they are viewed by some as the pillars supporting the independent [[Guilds]], others see them as a threat to the existing power structures. The Regents have divided the [[Empire]] into four distinct regions, a temporary arrangement that has led to concerns regarding the potential fragmentation of the united [[Empire]] into separate kingdoms. Although they have refused to take the throne themselves, maintaining that only a true [[Emperor]] can rule, their presence creates a complex political landscape where they may act to dismantle the influence of certain [[Guilds]]. The current Regents include [[Estyr Six]], [[Loreli]], [[Alagaeus]], and [[Jorin Curse-breaker]]. While they are not immortal like [[the Emperor]], they possess immense strength and are regarded as formidable warriors capable of standing against cosmic threats.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The four [[Regents]] have helped hold the [[Empire]] together.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Four [[Regents]] helped restore order to the [[Capital]] after [[the Emperor]]'s death.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Regents]] are attempting to manage the [[Empire]] in the absence of an [[Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Regents]] and the [[Blackwatch]] have handled the [[Elders]] for the past five years.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Regents are a group of four [[Imperial]] heroes who were awakened by [[Shera]]. Following the death of [[the Emperor]], these individuals sought to ensure the [[Empire]] remained in a state of anarchy. To achieve their ends, they divided the world into four distinct regions, with each [[Regent]] overseeing one of the resulting territories.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Yala]] is afraid of the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Regents]] wanted the [[Empire]] to remain in anarchy following [[the Emperor]]'s death.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Regents]] are four [[Imperial]] heroes who were woken by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Empire]] is divided into regions under four [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Regents]] split the world into four.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|As the four most powerful individuals in the world, the Regents constitute a group that requires constant control. They were recently provoked through a calculated effort, though they may remain unaware of certain ongoing movements. While some [[Champions]] argue that the [[Empire]] should be governed by separate regions under their leadership, the public may eventually look to the Regents for defense rather than the [[Guilds]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regents]] are the four most powerful people in the world.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regents]] were provoked for a calculated reason.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regents]] are a group that needs to be kept under control.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regents]] are a group that the people might look to for defense instead of the [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regents]] are a group that might be unaware of movements.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Some [[Champions]] believe the [[Empire]] should be governed by separate regions under [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Regents are a group of formidable political figures who find themselves targeted by assassins from the [[Magister]]'s [[Guild]]. During a period of instability, one member of this group is killed. Despite their influence, the Regents lack any interest in unifying the [[Empire]] and instead align themselves with the [[Independents]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|One of the [[Regents]] has been killed.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Regents]] are described as formidable.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Regents]] are not interested in unifying the [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Regents]] are on the side of the [[Independents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Regents]] are political figures targeted by the [[Magister]]'s [[Guild]] assassins.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Regents are a powerful group within the [[Empire]] possessing the ability to read shady backgrounds. While two of the three original members sealed the peace accords, the group later attacked the [[Imperial Steward]] under a flag of truce. Following the loss of their [[Emperor]], only two active Regents remained, and they faced opposition from [[Calder]], who hid the [[Emperor's armor]] from them. Although they initially clashed with [[Kelarac]] in battle, the Regents eventually agreed to attempt [[Calder]]'s plan. During a conflict involving bronze effigies, the Regents were seen floating in the air, while four versions of the Regents were cast in bronze to stand guard over [[Kelarac]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Regents]] have the ability to [[Read]] shady backgrounds.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Two of the three [[Regents]] sealed the peace accords.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Regents]] attacked the [[Imperial Steward]] under a flag of truce.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Regents]] are a group that holds power within the [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] is not cooperating with the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Empire]] currently has only two active [[Regents]] and no [[Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] believes a piece of the [[Optasia]] would allow him to stand as an equal to the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|There are two remaining [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Regents]] are willing to try [[Calder]]'s plan.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] had to hide the [[Emperor's armor]] from the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|There was a battle between [[Kelarac]] and the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The four [[Regents]] are cast in bronze and stand guard over [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Regents]] are fighting bronze effigies.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Regents]] were floating in the air.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Regents are four companions of [[the Emperor]] within the [[Aurelian Empire]] who sleep in coffins until they are required to defend humanity. Connected to the [[Mistress of the Mists]], these figures possess the authority to wage war and could potentially depose the [[Consultants]]. After being freed by [[Shera]], the group remained absent from a critical meeting, though their tomb was eventually examined. While they were expected to step down, the Regents provided firsthand accounts of the [[Elder War]] and made their own preparations as mortals gathered allies. During a conflict, three Regents fought [[Kelarac]] with apparent control before bronze statues of the four Regents of [[Beldin]] began dropping from holes in the sky to fight against [[Nakothi]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] freed the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are a group that [[Shera]] is demonstrating [[Consultant]] assets to.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] must approve the organization of the meeting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] may wage war to the full extent of their powers.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Regents]] are companions of [[the Emperor]] who sleep until needed to defend humanity.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are connected to the [[Mistress of the Mists]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are asleep in the coffins.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Regents]] were not present at the meeting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are part of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] would depose the [[Guilds]], specifically the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]] knows the [[Regents]] personally.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are sleeping.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The frozen [[Regents]] are a group that [[Lucan]] and [[Shera]] must face.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The tomb being examined is the tomb of the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] were the only authority figure left.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] provided firsthand accounts regarding the [[Elder War]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are expected to step down.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|There are four [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are among those who could potentially threaten Urg'naut or [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] made their own preparations while the mortals crammed allies on ships.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The three [[Regents]] are fighting [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] seemed to have [[Kelarac]] under control.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are four ancient bronze statues of the four [[Regents]] of [[Beldin]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] still flew in the skies after the battle.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are fighting against [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bronze statues of the [[Regents]] drop from holes in the sky.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] have bronze statues that use weapons.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“The Regents and the Blackwatch have handled the Elders for the past five years.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|"We provoked the Regents for a calculated reason," Maxeus said, addressing the room.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“If the Regents can Read shady backgrounds, I’d say we’re all in trouble.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We’re not a single Empire anymore, though,” Meia said. “We’ve already divided into regions, under the four Regents.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
